body.title: CLOSED: Move db_proxy canonical impl to agent_datacenter; shim Igor + UC
body.result: Full PGDatabaseProxy moved to agent_datacenter/db.py; both UC and Igor shims updated; test patch targets fixed; 4190 TheIgors + 4 ADC tests green
body.description:
The shim direction is backwards. wild_igor/igor/memory/db_proxy.py re-exports from lab.utility_closet.db_proxy, which means all Igor DB calls (TWM, cortex, memories) route through lab.utility_closet and log as lab.utility_closet.db_proxy. Igor's memory/cognition DB access should be canonical inside Igor, not dependent on lab.utility_closet.

Fix: move the canonical implementation back to wild_igor/igor/memory/db_proxy.py. Have lab/utility_closet/db_proxy.py be the shim that re-exports from Igor (or, if agent_datacenter/db.py is the intended long-term home, route both through there). The docstring on the current shim incorrectly says 'all new code should import from lab.utility_closet directly' — this must be corrected.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/memory/db_proxy.py (becomes canonical again), lab/utility_closet/db_proxy.py (becomes shim or stays independent), any callers inside lab/utility_closet/ that need db access
**Design rules:** architecture-separation — Igor = cognition+memory, utility_closet should not be Igor's dependency for Igor's own data stores
**Scope boundary:** flip import direction for Igor callers; do NOT break lab/utility_closet callers that use make_infra_proxy() (those can keep importing from lab.utility_closet). Public API stays identical.
**Test plan:** all 4187 TheIgors tests must pass; slow query log should now show logger=wild_igor.igor.memory.db_proxy for Igor's queries
